Description: The central hub where all players begin their journey on the server. It features a community chest where veteran players frequently leave starter gear, food, and tools to help newcomers get on their feet.

A giant statue and functional home located near spawn, created by 'duneparnits'. As one of the earliest builds on the server, it stands as a highly recognizable icon and a testament to the community's early days.

The personal residence built by the player 'Anonagon'. This location is notable for being directly connected to the eastern railway line, making it a convenient stop for travelers heading across the map.
